title: Cardoso Restates CBN’s Commitment To Youth Development - FinancialEDGE
description: The Governor of the Central Bank of Nigeria (CBN), Mr. Olayemi Cardoso, has reiterated the Bank’s commitment to developing the next generation of leaders in the financial and social sciences sectors. He has also emphasised the necessity of addressing the scarcity of skilled professionals infinance- related fields in Nigerian universities. Mr. Cardoso stated this recently
html:
The Governor of the Central Bank of Nigeria (CBN), Mr. Olayemi Cardoso, has reiterated the Bank’s commitment to developing the next generation of leaders in the financial and social sciences sectors.

He has also emphasised the necessity of addressing the scarcity of skilled professionals infinance- related fields in Nigerian universities. Mr. Cardoso stated this recently during a strategic engagement with the President and

Chairman of the Governing Council of the Nigerian Economic Society (NES), Professor
